title: App Settings - General - About - Up to date
scenario: General > About section in App Settings displays correct "Up to date" status, version number, and release notes link matching Figma design
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap the menu icon or navigate to the Home screen.
Tap on 'Settings' or 'Account' to access App Settings.
Scroll down and tap on 'General' to expand the General section.
Tap on 'About' to open the About page.
Observe the displayed information on the About screen.
expected: The About screen displays: (1) "Up to date" status text, (2) the correct version number (e.g., vX.X.X), and (3) a tappable "Release Notes" link. All elements match the Figma design specifications for layout, font, color, and spacing.
